headline: RBC Capital Reiterates Outperform on Weyerhaeuser, Maintains $30 Price Target
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Matthew McKellar   reiterates Weyerhaeuser (NYSE:WY) with a Outperform and maintains $30 price target.
